title: Normans Big Day Out
description: Norman is an unassuming, exhausted, and hapless man who charms the audience with his inability to perform mundane tasks and then wows them with extraordinary skill.​ Out to make a delivery the house is nowhere to be found, so with no other option he delivers to himself. Come see Norman and watch the ordinary become extraordinary as he explores his new home through a delightful mix of acrobatics and antics. Every day is different for Norman so you never know what he'll get up to, he might juggle his lunch, stand on his hands, flip through the air or even lasso a wild horse. There's more than enough adventure for everyone so come join Norman both in the audience and maybe even on stage for a show you'll never forget.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
